question.text: The Designated Body must submit the revised ATR to the complainant within:

answer.text: 10 calendar days of the review being sought
21 calendar days of the review being sought
7 calendar days of the review being sought
15 calendar days of the review being sought

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The Designated Body must submit the revised ATR within 10 calendar days of the review being sought. **The Trap:** This is shorter than the initial 21-day resolution window. **Cross-Exam Context:** Escalated reviews have tighter timelines. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The shorter timeline for reviews reflects the urgency of unresolved complaints.
